Interface Origin

All Superinterfaces:
Documentable
All Known Subinterfaces:
AddonModule.ModuleOrigin, Origin.AddonOrigin, Origin.ClassOrigin
public sealed interface Origin extends Documentable permits Origin.AddonOrigin (not exhaustive)
Provides information about the origin of something (such as syntax).

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static interface 
    Origin.AddonOrigin
    An origin to be used for something provided by an addon.
    static interface 
    Origin.ClassOrigin
    An Origin.AddonOrigin that also provides information about the class of the thing this origin is for.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Origin
    UNKNOWN
    An origin to be used in cases where no information is known.

  • Field Details

    • UNKNOWN

      static final Origin UNKNOWN
      An origin to be used in cases where no information is known.

  • Method Details

    • of

      @Contract("_ -> new") static Origin.AddonOrigin of(SkriptAddon addon)
      Constructs an origin from an addon.
      Parameters:
      addon - The addon to construct this origin from.
      Returns:
      An origin pointing to the provided addon.

    • of

      @Contract("_, _ -> new") static Origin.ClassOrigin of(SkriptAddon addon, Class<?> clazz)
      Constructs an origin from an addon and a class.
      Parameters:
      addon - The addon to construct this origin from.
      clazz - The class of the thing this origin is for.
      Returns:
      An origin pointing to the provided addon and class.

    • name

      String name()
      Returns:
      A string representing this origin.

    • write

      default void write(DocumentationAdapter adapter)
      Description copied from interface: Documentable
      Writes information about this object to an adapter.
      Specified by:
      write in interface Documentable
      Parameters:
      adapter - The adapter to write to.
